---
title: "Assigning hours to Y"
author: "Joey Frost-Xenopoulos - 0730136"
date: "2025-02-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r, fig.height = 9}
library(magick)

server_dir <- normalizePath(
  Sys.getenv("MAGNETO_SERVER_DIR", unset = "D:/SERVER/1902"),
  winslash = "/",
  mustWork = FALSE
)
timing_ticks_dir <- file.path(server_dir, "TimingTicks")
attempts_dir <- normalizePath(
  Sys.getenv("MAGNETO_ATTEMPTS_DIR", unset = file.path(getwd(), "Attempts")),
  winslash = "/",
  mustWork = FALSE
)
attempts_photos_dir <- file.path(attempts_dir, "Photos")

# Define the base name (without extension)
base_name <- "AGC-D-19020917-19020919"

# Construct paths using the base name
tif_path <- file.path(server_dir, paste0(base_name, ".tif"))
rds_path <- file.path(server_dir, paste0(base_name, ".tif-Digitized.rds"))
img_rds <- readRDS(rds_path)

# Load and process the image
img <- image_read(tif_path)
if (image_info(img)$width < image_info(img)$height) {
  img <- image_rotate(img, -90)
}

rds_path <- file.path(timing_ticks_dir, paste0(base_name, ".rds"))
tt <- readRDS(rds_path)

plot(img)
  # # Data lines
  lines(seq(from = img_rds$TopTraceStartEnds$Start + 125, to = img_rds$TopTraceStartEnds$End + 125),
       y =  img_rds$TopTraceMatrix + 96, col = "red")

  lines(seq(from = img_rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$Start + 125, to = img_rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$End + 125),
       y =  img_rds$BottomTraceMatrix + 96, col = "red")

for (i in seq_along(tt[[2]][["median_X"]])) {
  segments(
    x0 = tt[[2]][["median_X"]][i],  # x position for the line
    x1 = tt[[2]][["median_X"]][i],  # same x for vertical line
    y0 = 300,           # starting y position
    y1 = 400,           # ending y position
    col = "red",        # line color
    lwd = 1             # line width
  )
}

  for (i in seq_along(tt[[1]][["median_X"]])) {
  segments(
    x0 = tt[[1]][["median_X"]][i],  # x position for the line
    x1 = tt[[1]][["median_X"]][i],  # same x for vertical line
    y0 = 100,           # starting y position
    y1 = 200,           # ending y position
    col = "red",        # line color
    lwd = 1             # line width
  )
  }
```


We are associating time values with actual Y values calculated from the brush_clust application, and other timing tick finding applications. Here we will find how many hours are in a specific day, if any time is missing, and figuring out where to begin each day.
So we start by sorting, then we find the length of each day telling us if there is any missing data.
```{r}
base_dir <- timing_ticks_dir
files <- list.files(base_dir)
files <- files[files != "AGC-D-19020930-19021001.rds"]
files <- files[files != "AGC-D-19021106-19021107.rds"]

files <- "AGC-D-19020102-19020104.rds"

for (file in files) {
  print(file)
  # Load the RDS file
  tt <- tryCatch(readRDS(file.path(base_dir, file)), 
                 error = function(e) {
                   message(paste("Error reading:", file, "Skipping..."))
                   return(NULL)
                 })

  # Skip file if readRDS failed
  if (is.null(tt)) next
  
  # Check if tt[[1]] or tt[[2]] exist, and handle cases where one is NULL
  if (is.null(tt[[1]]) && is.null(tt[[2]])) {
    message(paste("Error:", file, "both traces are NULL. Skipping..."))
    next
  }
  
  # Sort median_X values if they exist
  if (!is.null(tt[[1]]) && !is.null(tt[[1]]$median_X)) {
    tt[[1]]$median_X <- sort(tt[[1]]$median_X, decreasing = FALSE)
  }
  if (!is.null(tt[[2]]) && !is.null(tt[[2]]$median_X)) {
    tt[[2]]$median_X <- sort(tt[[2]]$median_X, decreasing = FALSE)
  }

  # Get row counts for each trace (0 if NULL)
  length_bot <- ifelse(!is.null(tt[[1]]) && is.data.frame(tt[[1]]), nrow(tt[[1]]), 0)
  length_top <- ifelse(!is.null(tt[[2]]) && is.data.frame(tt[[2]]), nrow(tt[[2]]), 0)

  # Find the max length needed (up to 25)
  max_length <- max(length_bot, length_top, 25)

  # Assign times only to non-null traces
  if (!is.null(tt[[1]])) {
    start_time <- if (length_bot <= 24) "12:00:00" else "11:00:00"
    times <- seq(from = as.POSIXct(start_time, format = "%H:%M"), 
                 by = "hour", 
                 length.out = max_length)
    times <- format(times, format = "%H:%M")
    tt[[1]]$actual_time <- times[1:length_bot]
  }

  if (!is.null(tt[[2]])) {
    start_time <- if (length_top <= 24) "12:00:00" else "11:00:00"
    times <- seq(from = as.POSIXct(start_time, format = "%H:%M"), 
                 by = "hour", 
                 length.out = max_length)
    times <- format(times, format = "%H:%M")
    tt[[2]]$actual_time <- times[1:length_top]
  }
  
  
  # Save the modified object back
  saveRDS(tt, file.path(attempts_dir, file))
}

# ADJUSTMENTS
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# adjustments <- list(
#   "19020106" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 2"),
#   "19020120" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "-> 1"),
#   "19020217" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020225" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 3"),
#   "19020317" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "-> 1"),
#   "19020321" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020324" = data.frame(trace = "both", direction = "-> 1"),
#   "19020325" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "-> 1"),
#   "19020404" = data.frame(trace = "both", direction = "-> 1"),
#   "19020418" = data.frame(trace = "both", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020428" = data.frame(trace = "both", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020520" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "-> 1"),
#   "19020522" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020609" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "-> 1"),
#   "19020627" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020723" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "-> 2"),
#   "19020725" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "-> 1"),
#   "19020802" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020804" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020808" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020810" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020816" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "-> 2"),
#   "19020818" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "-> 1"),
#   "19020826" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020828" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020901" = data.frame(trace = "both", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020917" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "-> 1"),
#   "19020921" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020923" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19020923" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "-> 2"),
#   "19020925" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "<- 2"),
#   "19020927" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021001" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021003" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021029" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021031" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021102" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021106" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021116" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021122" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "-> 1"),
#   "19021128" = data.frame(trace = "top", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021208" = data.frame(trace = "both", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021216" = data.frame(trace = "both", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021218" = data.frame(trace = "both", direction = "<- 1"),
#   "19021220" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "<- 1")
#   )

# This code here is the adjustments to the code above.
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

base_dir <- attempts_dir
rds_files <- list.files(base_dir, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)


adjustments <- list(
  "19020623" = data.frame(trace = "bot", direction = "<- 1")
)

for (i in seq_along(1:length(adjustments)))
{
    date_key <- names(adjustments)[i]
    matched_file <- rds_files[sapply(rds_files, function(file) {
          match <- regmatches(file, regexpr("D-\\d{8}", file)) # Find "D-YYYYMMDD"
          if (length(match) > 0) {
              extracted_date <- sub("D-", "", match) # Remove "D-" prefix
              return(extracted_date == date_key)
          }
          return(FALSE)
      })]

    tt <- readRDS(matched_file)

    direction <- substr(adjustments[[date_key]][["direction"]], 1,2)
    amount <- as.numeric(substr(adjustments[[date_key]][["direction"]], 4, 4))

    if (adjustments[[date_key]][["trace"]] == "top") {
    times <- tt[[2]]$actual_time # Extract actual_time vector
    numeric_times <- as.numeric(sub(":00", "", times)) # Makes the times numeric

     if (direction == "<-") {
        numeric_times <- numeric_times + amount  # Shift times forward
    } else {
        numeric_times <- numeric_times - amount  # Shift times backward
    }

    numeric_times[numeric_times == 24] <- 0
    numeric_times <- (numeric_times + 24) %% 24
    tt[[2]]$actual_time <- paste0(numeric_times, ":00")
  }


  if (adjustments[[date_key]][["trace"]] == "bot") {
      times <- tt[[1]]$actual_time  # Extract actual_time vector for "bot"
        numeric_times <- as.numeric(sub(":00", "", times))

      if (direction == "<-") {
          numeric_times <- numeric_times + amount  # Shift times forward
      } else {
          numeric_times <- numeric_times - amount  # Shift times backward
      }

      numeric_times[numeric_times == 24] <- 0
      numeric_times <- (numeric_times + 24) %% 24  # Handles negative values correctly
      formatted_times <- sprintf("%02d:00", numeric_times)

      # Update tt object
      tt[[1]]$actual_time <- formatted_times
  }

    if (adjustments[[date_key]][["trace"]] == "both") {
    times <- tt[[2]]$actual_time  # Extract actual_time vector for "top"
    numeric_times <- as.numeric(sub(":00", "", times))  # Convert times to numeric

    if (direction == "<-") {
        numeric_times <- numeric_times + amount  # Shift times forward
    } else {
        numeric_times <- numeric_times - amount  # Shift times backward
    }

    numeric_times[numeric_times == 24] <- 0  # Convert 24 to 0 (midnight transition)
    numeric_times <- (numeric_times + 24) %% 24  # Ensure valid range (0-23)
    formatted_times <- sprintf("%02d:00", numeric_times)  # Format back to "HH:00"

    # Update tt object for "top"
    tt[[2]]$actual_time <- formatted_times

    # For bot
    times <- tt[[1]]$actual_time  # Extract actual_time vector for "bot"
    numeric_times <- as.numeric(sub(":00", "", times))  # Convert times to numeric

    if (direction == "<-") {
        numeric_times <- numeric_times + amount  # Shift times forward
    } else {
        numeric_times <- numeric_times - amount  # Shift times backward
    }

    numeric_times[numeric_times == 24] <- 0  # Convert 24 to 0 (midnight transition)
    numeric_times <- (numeric_times + 24) %% 24  # Ensure valid range (0-23)
    formatted_times <- sprintf("%02d:00", numeric_times)  # Format back to "HH:00"

    # Update tt object for "bot"
    tt[[1]]$actual_time <- formatted_times
}
    saveRDS(tt, file = matched_file)
}

```

```{r}
# Read the RDS file
tt <- readRDS(file.path(attempts_dir, "AGC-D-19020508-19020510.rds"))

# Remove the 'actual_time' column from the first part
tt[[1]]$actual_time <- NULL

# Get unique values for 'median_X'
unique_values <- unique(tt[[1]]$median_X)

# Fill 'median_X' with unique values and NA to match the row count
tt[[1]]$median_X <- c(unique_values, rep(NA, nrow(tt[[1]]) - length(unique_values)))

# Ensure the 'median_X' column has the correct length after filling with NA
tt[[1]]$median_X <- ifelse(length(tt[[1]]$median_X) == nrow(tt[[1]]), 
                            tt[[1]]$median_X, 
                            rep(NA, nrow(tt[[1]])))

# Determine the length of the 'bot' and 'top' parts
length_bot <- ifelse(!is.null(tt[[1]]) && is.data.frame(tt[[1]]), nrow(tt[[1]]), 0)
length_top <- ifelse(!is.null(tt[[2]]) && is.data.frame(tt[[2]]), nrow(tt[[2]]), 0)

# Generate times sequence (assuming `max_length` is the length you want for `actual_time`)
max_length <- max(length_bot, length_top)  # Adjust to the larger of the two lengths

times <- seq(from = as.POSIXct("12:00:00", format = "%H:%M"), 
             by = "hour", 
             length.out = max_length)

times <- format(times, format = "%H:%M")

# Assign 'actual_time' for 'bot' (index 1) based on length
tt[[1]]$actual_time <- times[1:length(tt[[1]]$actual_time)]

# Save the updated object
saveRDS(tt, file.path(attempts_dir, "AGC-D-19020508-19020510.rds"))

```


```{r, fig.height = 9}
library(magick)  # For image processing

# Define directories
photos_dir <- attempts_photos_dir

# Get all .rds files
rds_files <- list.files(attempts_dir, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

# Loop through each .rds file
for (rds_path in rds_files) {
  # Extract base name (remove path and extension)
  base_name <- sub("\\.rds$", "", basename(rds_path))
  
  # Construct paths for the corresponding .tif image and digitized data
  tif_path <- file.path(server_dir, paste0(base_name, ".tif"))
  digitized_rds_path <- file.path(server_dir, paste0(base_name, ".tif-Digitized.rds"))
  
  # Check if the required files exist before proceeding
  if (!file.exists(digitized_rds_path) || !file.exists(tif_path)) {
    cat("Skipping", base_name, "- Missing required files\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Load the digitized data
  img_rds <- readRDS(digitized_rds_path)
  
  # Load and process the image
  img <- image_read(tif_path)
  if (image_info(img)$width < image_info(img)$height) {
    img <- image_rotate(img, -90)
  }
  
  # Load timing tick data
  tt <- readRDS(rds_path)
  # Create plot
  png_filename <- paste0(photos_dir, base_name, ".png")
  png(png_filename, width = 2000, height = 1400, res = 200)  
  
  plot(as.raster(img))
  
  # **Plot the traces in red (only if the data exists)**
  if (!is.null(img_rds$TopTraceStartEnds$Start) && !is.null(img_rds$TopTraceStartEnds$End)) {
    lines(seq(from = img_rds$TopTraceStartEnds$Start + 125, 
              to = img_rds$TopTraceStartEnds$End + 125),
          y = img_rds$TopTraceMatrix + 96, col = "red")
  }
  
  if (!is.null(img_rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$Start) && !is.null(img_rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$End)) {
    lines(seq(from = img_rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$Start + 125, 
              to = img_rds$BottomTraceStartEnds$End + 125),
          y = img_rds$BottomTraceMatrix + 96, col = "red")
  }
  
  # **Plot vertical lines and time labels for Top Trace (only if tt[[2]] exists)**
  if (!is.null(tt[[2]]) && !is.null(tt[[2]][["median_X"]])) {
    for (i in seq_along(tt[[2]][["median_X"]])) {
      x_pos <- tt[[2]][["median_X"]][i]
      y_start <- 300
      y_end <- 400
      y_mid <- mean(c(y_start, y_end))  # Midpoint for text placement
  
      # Draw vertical segment
      segments(x0 = x_pos, x1 = x_pos, y0 = y_start, y1 = y_end, col = "red", lwd = 1)
  
      # Add text label next to the midpoint
      if (!is.null(tt[[2]][["actual_time"]][i])) {
        text(x_pos, y_mid, labels = tt[[2]][["actual_time"]][i], col = "blue", cex = 0.7, pos = 3)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # **Plot vertical lines and time labels for Bottom Trace (only if tt[[1]] exists)**
  if (!is.null(tt[[1]]) && !is.null(tt[[1]][["median_X"]])) {
    for (i in seq_along(tt[[1]][["median_X"]])) {
      x_pos <- tt[[1]][["median_X"]][i]
      y_start <- 100
      y_end <- 200
      y_mid <- mean(c(y_start, y_end))  # Midpoint for text placement
  
      # Draw vertical segment
      segments(x0 = x_pos, x1 = x_pos, y0 = y_start, y1 = y_end, col = "red", lwd = 1)
  
      # Add text label next to the midpoint
      if (!is.null(tt[[1]][["actual_time"]][i])) {
        text(x_pos, y_mid, labels = tt[[1]][["actual_time"]][i], col = "blue", cex = 0.7, pos = 1)
      }
    }
  }
  
  dev.off()  # Close the graphics device and save the file
  
  cat("Saved:", png_filename, "\n")  # Print confirmation
}
```




```{r}
base_dir <- timing_ticks_dir
files <- list.files(base_dir)

base_dir <- attempts_dir
rds_files <- list.files(base_dir, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)
```
